shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc "pwd && printf '%s\\n' '--- status ---' && git status --short && printf '%s\\n' '--- files ---' && rg --files | sed -n '1,120p' && printf '%s\\n' '--- highlight refs ---' && rg -n \"initialHighlightedIndex|defaultHighlightedIndex|isItemDisabled\" src test __tests__ 2>/dev/null | sed -n '1,240p'"
/bin/bash -lc "git log --oneline --all -- src/hooks/utils.js | sed -n '1,30p' && git remote -v && cat package.json | sed -n '1,120p' && rg -n \"getHighlightedIndexOnOpen\" -g '*test*' ."

/bin/bash -lc "rg -n \"out of bounds|defaultHighlightedIndex: .*length|initialHighlightedIndex: .*length\" src/hooks test | sed -n '1,120p' && rg -n \"getInitialState\\(\" src/hooks/__tests__ src/hooks/useSelect/__tests__ src/hooks/useCombobox/__tests__ | head"
